name: Stablecoin Contagion Crypto Crash
description: A synchronized 80%+ drawdown in crypto assets together with major stablecoin depegs drains exchange and DeFi liquidity, hits funds and banks with crypto exposure, tightens credit, and freezes venture funding—culminating in tech labor cuts.
trigger_event: Systemic stablecoin failure and forced liquidations across crypto markets

market_wide_liquidation.event: Crypto total market cap falls over 80% from cycle peak
market_wide_liquidation.detail: Bitcoin fell roughly 77% peak-to-trough in 2022; broad altcoin indices fell more. An 80%+ aggregate crash implies multi-trillion notional destroyed.
market_wide_liquidation.source: CoinMetrics; Bloomberg 2022 crypto market peak-to-trough data

household_crypto_losses.event: Retail and small-business crypto balances mark down sharply
household_crypto_losses.detail: Federal Reserve Survey of Consumer Finances and ECB household reports show non-trivial crypto participation; wealth effect hits discretionary spending.
household_crypto_losses.source: Fed SCF 2022; Bank for International Settlements crypto exposure studies

exchange_insolvency_risk.event: Major centralized exchanges halt withdrawals amid runs
exchange_insolvency_risk.detail: FTX November 2022 showed rapid freezes; customer assets became bankruptcy claims—Chainalysis documented large on-chain outflows during stress.
exchange_insolvency_risk.source: Chainalysis 2023 crypto crime report; FTX bankruptcy docket

stablecoin_depeg.event: Large stablecoins break peg; tens of billions of dollars flee
stablecoin_depeg.detail: Terra/UST lost peg May 2022 erasing on the order of $40B; USDC traded near $0.87 intraday March 2023 during SVB stress.
stablecoin_depeg.unit: % max depeg from par (major stress analog)
stablecoin_depeg.source: Board of Governors Federal Reserve, Money and Payments discussion papers; CoinDesk Terra coverage

counterparty_credit_tightening.event: Banks and brokers cut crypto prime brokerage and deposit relationships
counterparty_credit_tightening.detail: Post-2022, several U.S. crypto-facing banks failed or exited; Basel finalized stricter bank capital treatment for crypto exposures.
counterparty_credit_tightening.unit: % reduction in bank crypto on-ramp capacity (scenario)
counterparty_credit_tightening.source: FDIC Silicon Valley Bank report; Basel Committee standard on crypto exposures

hedge_fund_redemptions.event: Crypto-native and macro funds face margin calls and investor redemptions
hedge_fund_redemptions.detail: Three Arrows, Celsius, and lenders illustrated leverage chains; industry-wide asset management losses in 2022 were widely reported in the tens of billions.
hedge_fund_redemptions.unit: billion USD notional stress (order of magnitude)
hedge_fund_redemptions.source: Bloomberg crypto hedge fund coverage; public bankruptcy filings

credit_spreads_widen.event: High-yield and leveraged loan spreads widen in risk-off
credit_spreads_widen.detail: ICE BofA US High Yield OAS exceeded 600 bps in June 2022; syndicated loan markets price higher defaults when financial conditions tighten.
credit_spreads_widen.unit: basis points HY OAS widening (illustrative episode)
credit_spreads_widen.source: Federal Reserve Financial Stability Report; ICE BofA US High Yield index

vc_funding_freeze.event: Global venture deal value for tech falls sharply
vc_funding_freeze.detail: Crunchbase and PitchBook data show VC activity dropped materially in 2022–2023; crypto and growth equity were disproportionately hit.
vc_funding_freeze.unit: % YoY drop in VC invested (cycle analog)
vc_funding_freeze.source: PitchBook NVCA Venture Monitor; Crunchbase annual reports

tech_startup_layoffs.event: Technology companies announce broad layoffs as runway shortens
tech_startup_layoffs.detail: Layoffs.fyi tracked more than 150,000 tech layoffs in 2022 at major employers; smaller startups cut deeper in percentage terms.

personal_wealth_shock.event: Your crypto and risk-asset holdings lose most of their value
personal_wealth_shock.detail: Direct household impact from exchange limits and token depreciation on wallets and retirement accounts with crypto ETPs.

personal_job_insecurity.event: Your job search or gig income worsens in a funding winter
personal_job_insecurity.detail: Hiring freezes and offer rescinds concentrated in tech and crypto-adjacent roles; duration of unemployment rises for affected cohorts.
